name: Aroma Concealer
description:
Activate 1 minute (Interact)

This oily mix of herbs and natural detergents can be applied to a creature to reduce and cover any ordinary odors they produce. The creature receives a +2 item bonus to Stealth checks to or against creatures using primarily smell. This bonus also applies to the DC to the creature by scent. The listed amount is enough to cover one Medium or smaller creature and takes 1 minute to apply. The effect lasts for 1 hour after applying.
